name: convertTimestamp, convertTimestampNS
title: convertTimestamp, convertTimestampNS
syntax: void convertTimestamp(dword timestamp, dword& days, byte& hours, byte& minutes, byte& seconds, word& milliSeconds, word& microSeconds); // form 1
void convertTimestampNS(qword timestamp, dword& days, byte& hours, byte& minutes, byte& seconds, word& milliSeconds, word& microSeconds, word& nanoSeconds); // form 2
description: Converts a time stamp to separate parts
(form 1: maximum time: .2^32 * 10 microseconds = 11 hours, 55 minutes, 49 seconds, 672 milliseconds, 96 microseconds).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: time stamp in 10 microseconds (form 1) time stamp in nanoseconds (form 2)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Receives the days of the time stamp

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Receives the hours the time stamp (between 0 and 23)

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Receives the minutes of the time stamp (between 0 and 59)

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: Receives the seconds of the time stamp (between 0 and 59)

parameters.name: milliseconds
parameters.description: Receives the milliseconds of the time stamp (between 0 and 999)

parameters.name: microseconds
parameters.description: Receives the microseconds of the time stamp (between 0 and 999)

parameters.name: nanoseconds (only form 2)
parameters.description: Receives the nanoseconds of the time stamp (between 0 and 999)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
